name: Path Equivalence: 'filename/' (Trailing Slash)
description: The product does not properly handle filenames with trailing slashes, which some systems strip or interpret as directory indicators, allowing attackers to bypass access controls that match against the slash-suffixed form differently from the canonical form.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with a trailing slash that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check treats 'filename/' differently from 'filename' while the filesystem resolves them equivalently at STORAGE[file_access]
